findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "search" is 809 chars, far longer than this server's median (88). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Search the tldraw Editor API spec by writing JavaScript that receives a `spec` object and returns a result. The spec contains: spec.members (all Editor methods/…

findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "search" appears informational but accepts parameters (code) that enable code/file/secret access.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "exec" is 1438 chars, far longer than this server's median (88). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.
